title: parathelypteris borealis
intro: Parathelypteris borealis, also known as the northern lady fern, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Parathelypteris borealis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other remedies to harness its medicinal properties.
